SEARCH
Package io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.parser

Interface JsonValue

All Known Implementing Classes:
JsonValue.JsonArray, JsonValue.JsonBoolean, JsonValue.JsonNull, JsonValue.JsonNumber, JsonValue.JsonObject, JsonValue.JsonString
public sealed interface JsonValue permits JsonValue.JsonObject, JsonValue.JsonArray, JsonValue.JsonString, JsonValue.JsonNumber, JsonValue.JsonBoolean, JsonValue.JsonNull
A purely functional JSON AST with built-in optics.

    • of

      static JsonValue of(Object val)
      Creates a JsonValue from a potentially null object. Handles primitives, fj collections (Maybe, List, Vector, HashMap), and Java Records.

    • toRecord

      default <R> R toRecord(Class<R> recordClass)
